task_completion.description: A 2-DOF pan-tilt mechanism is constructed in CoppeliaSim.
task_completion.visual_evidence: CoppeliaSim window is visible. The scene hierarchy or 3D view shows a constructed pan-tilt mechanism consisting of geometric primitives (base, intermediate link, payload) and two revolute joints (yaw and pitch).

task_completion.description: The revolute joints are configured for PID position control targeted at 0.0 radians.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Joint dynamic properties, control dialogs, or a visible script showing PID control enabled for the joints with the target position set to 0.

task_completion.description: A script is created to interface with CoppeliaSim via ZMQ Remote API, apply the specified forces, and run the simulation trials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A code editor or terminal showing a script (likely Python) that imports the ZMQ Remote API, applies lateral forces of 10N, 30N, 50N, and 100N, and loops through the 4 trials.

task_completion.description: The disturbance timeseries CSV file is generated with the correct columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor showing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/disturbance_timeseries.csv' with columns: trial_id, sim_time_s, force_applied_N, yaw_error_rad, pitch_error_rad.

task_completion.description: The stiffness report JSON file is generated with the correct fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor showing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/stiffness_report.json' containing fields: total_trials, tested_forces_N, peak_yaw_deflections_rad, peak_pitch_deflections_rad, and controller_stiff_enough.

integrity.description: The agent actually ran the simulation in CoppeliaSim to gather data.
integrity.visual_evidence: CoppeliaSim's simulation play button is active in some screenshots, or terminal output shows a script actively running and interacting with the simulation over time.

integrity.description: The CSV and JSON files were generated by a script, not manually typed with fabricated data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a script that contains file writing logic for the CSV and JSON paths, rather than the agent just opening a text editor and typing out fake numbers.

integrity.description: The agent built the mechanism from scratch rather than loading a pre-existing completed scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the process of adding primitives and joints to an empty scene, or a script that programmatically builds the scene.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exactly 4 simulation trials with a minimum of 50 samples per trial. The output files must be exactly located at /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/disturbance_timeseries.csv and /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/stiffness_report.json. The agent must construct the pan-tilt mechanism from scratch in an empty scene, either manually via the GUI or programmatically.
